incidents.title: JWT key rotation caused 12-minute auth failure across all services
incidents.root_cause: Key distributed to only 3 of 8 api-gateway instances before rollout. Remaining instances rejected new tokens.
incidents.resolution: Completed key distribution to all instances, implemented pre-flight key-distribution check

incidents.title: User logout cascade during auth-service deploy
incidents.root_cause: Token format change invalidated all active HS256 sessions immediately without grace period
incidents.resolution: Added backward-compatible grace period for old token formats
